stimulus: Smaller than grains of sand, water bears (tardigrades) are among the toughest creatures known. These minuscule organisms can survive years of complete dehydration, and ______blank can endure radiation doses that would kill most other life forms.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice A is correct. The plural pronoun “they” agrees with the plural antecedent “organisms” (referring to tardigrades).

Choices B, C, and D are all singular pronouns that don’t agree with the plural antecedent.
